title: 宝塚記念の後に・暗影

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka has held onto her lead over Air
Groove!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Look at her go! The Otherworldly Front-Runner
has left the Empress in her wake!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Male Fan
text_block_list.text: You're so awesome, Suzuka! You're the best!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text:
What a race, Suzuka! I'll always be watching you
from the stands!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: (I... lost again...)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ngh.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You were... incredible. You completely outclassed
me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I'm really happy that I got to race with
you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It was an honor. Next time...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It's... nothing.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Next time... victory will be mine.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I don't intend to lose either.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'll be waiting for our next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we leave the racecourse, Air Groove's
expression is more grave than I've ever seen it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka truly was incredible. She was beautiful,
unbound, and... powerful.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Everyone was enraptured by her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Including me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: The way she ignited the crowd...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That kind of feat is... far beyond me right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove is clearly deflated. I desperately try to
think of something to say...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Please... Don't make that face.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We've still got training tomorrow. Slow and
steady, just like normal.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
For the time being, the race we need to aim for is
the Sapporo Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes... that should do, shouldn't it? There's
nothing you need to worry about anymore.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...I'm going back ahead of you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Air Groove dashes off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I've never seen Air Groove like this before...
